home.heroDesc: Upload any audio file and get a full transcript with speaker labels, a summary, key actions, and custom AI analysis — in minutes.
home.howItWorksDesc: Three simple steps to go from audio to insight.
home.stepUploadDesc: Drag and drop your .m4a, .mp3, or .wav file. We detect the duration and language automatically.
home.stepProcessDesc: AI transcribes with speaker labels, generates a summary, key actions, and your custom analysis.
home.stepDownloadDesc: View results instantly. Download as text or JSON. Your audio is deleted immediately.
home.capabilitiesDesc: One upload, three outputs — plus custom AI analysis from your own prompt.
home.capSpeakerDesc: Know who said what with automatic speaker labels and diarization.
home.capOutputsDesc: Full transcript, smart summary with key actions, and custom AI analysis from your prompt.
home.capLanguagesDesc: Auto-detects the spoken language — or manually select one before processing.
home.capPrivacyDesc: Your audio is deleted immediately after transcription. Only your transcripts and outputs are retained.
home.capSpeedDesc: Upload and get your results in minutes — no waiting, no queues.
home.capPromptsDesc: Ask anything about your transcript — extract quotes, action items, decisions, or anything else.
home.pricingCtaDesc: One-time purchases and credit packs — no subscriptions, no hidden fees.
home.trustStrip: Audio files are deleted immediately after processing. Transcripts and outputs are retained in your account.
home.footerDesc: Premium AI transcription with speaker labels, summaries, and custom analysis. Privacy-first — audio deleted after processing.

Do not rely on this as a verbatim record for medical, legal, or financial decisions. Always verify critical information with the original source.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Body: WhatSaid is operated by Fabio Petito, trading as WhatSaid. We provide an AI-powered audio transcription and analysis service. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use WhatSaid.
privacy.s2AccountData: Account data: email address and display name (when you create an account)
privacy.s2AudioFiles: Audio files: uploaded temporarily for processing only — deleted immediately after
privacy.s2Transcripts: Transcripts and outputs: generated text, summaries, and custom AI analysis
privacy.s2PaymentMeta: Payment and billing data: transaction references and purchase history are managed by Paddle, our merchant of record — we never see or store your card details
privacy.s2UsageData: Usage data: job history, credit balances, and language preferences
privacy.s2TechnicalData: Technical data: browser type, device information, and IP address collected automatically for security and service operation
privacy.s3Item1: To process your audio and deliver transcripts, summaries, and custom outputs
privacy.s3Item2: To manage your account, credits, and purchase history
privacy.s3Item3: To improve service reliability, prevent abuse, and maintain security
privacy.s4Item1: Contract performance: processing your audio and delivering the outputs you purchased
privacy.s4Item2: Legitimate interests: maintaining service security, preventing fraud, and improving reliability
privacy.s4Item3: Legal obligation: retaining transaction records as required by applicable law
privacy.s4Item4: Consent: where required for specific processing activities, such as marketing communications
privacy.s5Body1: Audio files are deleted immediately after processing. We do not retain, archive, or replay your original audio.
privacy.s5Body2: Only the generated text outputs (transcript, summary, custom output) and associated job metadata are stored.
privacy.s5Body3: For account holders, transcripts and outputs are retained until you delete your account. You may request deletion of your data at any time by contacting support@whatsaid.app.
privacy.s6Intro: We use the following third-party services to deliver WhatSaid:
privacy.s6AssemblyAI: AssemblyAI — speech-to-text transcription (audio is transmitted securely and processed in the US)
privacy.s6Paddle: Paddle — payments are processed securely by Paddle, our merchant of record. Paddle handles all payment data, billing, tax, and receipts on our behalf.
privacy.s6Cloud: Cloud hosting provider — database, authentication, and file storage
privacy.s6Transfer: Your audio may be transferred internationally for processing. We rely on appropriate safeguards as required by applicable data protection laws.
privacy.s7Body: We retain your account data and generated outputs for as long as your account is active. Transaction records are retained as required by applicable law. Audio files are never retained — they are deleted immediately after processing.
privacy.s8Body: We use industry-standard measures to protect your data, including encrypted connections, secure cloud infrastructure, and access controls. Audio files are processed over encrypted channels and deleted immediately after.
privacy.s9Body: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the right to access, correct, delete, or export your personal data, and to object to or restrict processing. To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at support@whatsaid.app.
privacy.s10Body: WhatSaid does not currently use analytics cookies or third-party tracking. We use only essential session cookies required for authentication.
privacy.s11Body: WhatSaid is not intended for use by individuals under 18. We do not knowingly collect data from minors.
privacy.s12Body: Your data may be processed and stored in countries outside your jurisdiction, including the United States. We rely on appropriate safeguards and contractual protections as required by applicable data protection laws.
privacy.s13Body: We may update this policy from time to time. Material changes will be communicated via the service or email for account holders. WhatSaid is operated by Fabio Petito, trading as WhatSaid. If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or want to exercise your privacy rights, contact us at support@whatsaid.app.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1Body: By creating an account or using WhatSaid, you agree to these Terms of Service and our <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink>. If you do not agree, do not use the service.
terms.s2Body: WhatSaid is operated by Fabio Petito, trading as WhatSaid. For any questions about these terms, contact us at support@whatsaid.app.
terms.s3Body: WhatSaid provides AI-powered audio transcription, summarisation, and custom text analysis. Outputs are generated by artificial intelligence and may contain errors, omissions, or inaccuracies. They should not be relied upon as verbatim legal, medical, or official records.
terms.s4Item1: Upload recordings made without the consent of recorded parties where consent is required by law
terms.s4Item2: Use the service for surveillance, covert monitoring, or any illegal purpose
terms.s4Item3: Upload content that violates any applicable law or third-party rights
terms.s4Item4: Attempt to abuse, overload, or interfere with the service
terms.s4Outro: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.
terms.s5Item1: Credits are prepaid and do not expire unless stated otherwise at the time of purchase
terms.s5Item2: Payments are processed securely by Paddle, our merchant of record. Paddle handles billing, tax, and receipts on our behalf.
terms.s5Item3: If a job fails due to a service error, credits will be returned to your balance automatically
terms.s5Item4: All prices are displayed before purchase. The final amount and any applicable tax are confirmed by Paddle at checkout.
terms.s6Body: WhatSaid is a digital service. When you purchase credits or a one-time transcript, the digital product is delivered immediately upon successful processing. Delivery is complete when your transcript, summary, and outputs are available in your account.
terms.s7Body: Our approach to refunds is set out in our <refundLink>Refund Policy</refundLink>. Payments are processed securely by Paddle, our merchant of record, and refund handling follows the Paddle transaction process.
terms.s8Body: The WhatSaid service, branding, and technology are owned and operated by Fabio Petito, trading as WhatSaid. You retain ownership of the content you upload and the outputs generated from your audio. You may not copy, reproduce, or redistribute the WhatSaid service itself.
terms.s9Body: All outputs — including transcripts, summaries, speaker labels, and custom analysis — are generated by AI and are provided "as is". WhatSaid does not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or fitness for purpose of any output. Speaker identification is approximate and should not be treated as definitive attribution.
terms.s10Body: We aim to keep WhatSaid available and reliable, but we do not guarantee uninterrupted service. We may update, modify, or discontinue features at any time. Material changes affecting existing purchases will be communicated to account holders.
terms.s11Body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, WhatSaid and its operators shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service, including but not limited to damages arising from AI output inaccuracies or recording consent issues.
terms.s12Body: We may suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms. You may delete your account at any time from Settings. Unused credits are not refundable upon voluntary account deletion.
terms.s13Body: These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of England and Wales. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of England and Wales.
terms.s14Body: For questions about these terms, contact us at support@whatsaid.app.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.s1Body: This Refund Policy applies to purchases made from WhatSaid, operated by Fabio Petito, trading as WhatSaid. We want every purchase to deliver real value. If something goes wrong, we will work with you to make it right.
refund.s2Body: To request a refund, contact us at support@whatsaid.app with your account email and a brief description of the issue. We aim to respond within 2 business days.
refund.s3Body: Refunds may be issued if processing fails due to a service error and credits are not automatically restored, if a duplicate purchase is made by mistake, or if a technical issue prevents you from accessing your purchased outputs. Since WhatSaid is a digital service with immediate delivery, refunds are generally not available once processing has been completed successfully and outputs are delivered to your account.
refund.s4Body: Refunds are generally not available for successfully processed files where outputs have been delivered, dissatisfaction with AI-generated output quality (as noted in our Terms, AI outputs may contain errors), voluntary account deletion with unused credits, or purchases where the service performed as described.
refund.s5Body: If you are charged twice for the same purchase or experience a payment error, contact us and we will investigate and resolve it promptly. In cases of obvious billing errors, we will issue a correction or refund.
refund.s6Body: Payments are processed securely by Paddle, our merchant of record. Paddle handles billing, tax, receipts, and the refund transaction process on our behalf. Approved refunds are processed through Paddle and returned to the original payment method.
refund.s7Body: Nothing in this policy excludes or limits your statutory consumer rights under applicable law. If you have any questions about this Refund Policy or would like to request a refund, contact us at support@whatsaid.app.

footer.desc: Premium AI transcription with speaker labels, summaries, and custom analysis. Privacy-first — audio deleted after processing.
footer.operator: Operated by Fabio Petito, trading as WhatSaid

pricing.heroSubtitle: Get a transcript, AI summary, follow-up questions, downloadable output, and saved history — all in one place.
pricing.heroSupport: Create your account in seconds, upload your file, and keep everything accessible whenever you need it.
pricing.valueTitle: What you get with every file
pricing.valueSubtitle: Upload once and receive everything you need — no per-minute pricing, no hidden extras.
pricing.valTranscriptDesc: Accurate, speaker-labelled transcript powered by advanced speech AI.
pricing.valSummaryDesc: Key points, actions, and decisions — extracted automatically.
pricing.valQuestionsDesc: Ask anything about your transcript and get AI-generated answers.
pricing.valDownloadDesc: Export your results as text, JSON, DOCX, or PDF — anytime.
pricing.valSavedDesc: Your transcripts, summaries, and downloads stay accessible in your account.
pricing.cardsTitle: Choose how you want to start
pricing.cardsSubtitle: One-time or credit packs — your results stay saved in your account.
pricing.featureSavedAll: Saved history for all processed files
pricing.disclaimer: Displayed in your selected currency. Final amount and any applicable tax are confirmed securely by Paddle at checkout.
pricing.paddleNote: Payments are processed securely by Paddle, our merchant of record.
pricing.consentPrefix: By purchasing, you agree to our
pricing.trustTitle: Why do I need an account?
pricing.trustBody: Create your account in seconds so your transcript, summary, downloads, and history stay available whenever you need them.
pricing.trustReason: This is why purchases are account-based — so everything remains accessible and downloadable later.
pricing.howStep1Desc: Sign up in seconds with your email or Google account.
pricing.howStep2Desc: Drag and drop your .m4a, .mp3, or .wav file.
pricing.howStep3Desc: Transcript, summary, follow-up questions, and downloads — all saved in your account.
pricing.faqAccountQ: Do I need an account before buying?
pricing.faqAccountA: Yes. Your account keeps your transcript, summary, downloads, and history saved and accessible whenever you need them.
pricing.faqCreditA: One credit processes one audio file and includes a full transcript, AI summary, and follow-up questions — all downloadable and saved in your account.
pricing.faqExpireA: Credits remain available in your account based on the product terms.
pricing.faqDownloadQ: Can I download my results later?
pricing.faqDownloadA: Yes. All results stay saved in your account and can be downloaded anytime.
pricing.faqSubscriptionA: No. These are one-time purchases. Buy what you need, when you need it.
pricing.faqVariationQ: Why might the checkout amount vary slightly by country?
pricing.faqVariationA: Prices are localised for supported currencies and regions. The final amount, formatting, and any applicable tax are confirmed by Paddle at checkout.
pricing.finalTitle: Choose the option that fits how you work
pricing.finalBody: Start with one file or get credits for repeat use — your results stay saved in your account.
pricing.comingSoon: Payment system is being finalised — check back soon.

transcriptionSettings.title: Transcription settings
transcriptionSettings.strategyBalancedDesc: Standard transcription. Best for clear audio with distinct speakers.
transcriptionSettings.strategyRecoveryDesc: Maximises recovery of faint speech, short interjections, and disfluencies. Best for difficult mono recordings like phone calls.
transcriptionSettings.strategyReviewDesc: Flags unclear audio as [unclear] instead of guessing. Best for QA workflows.
transcriptionSettings.strategyKeytermsDesc: Improve accuracy for specific names, medical terms, or jargon.
transcriptionSettings.keytermsHelp: Enter terms separated by commas. Up to 1,000 words or phrases (max 6 words each).
transcriptionSettings.speakersHelp: Leave on Auto-detect unless you already know how many people are speaking.
transcriptionSettings.enhanceHelp: Reduces volume differences between speakers. Recommended for phone calls recorded on speaker.

notifications.pdfReady: Your PDF is ready to download
notifications.pdfExportFailed: PDF export failed — please try again
notifications.exportAlreadyRunning: This export is already in progress
